description: The VolumeTranslationGizmo component is used to move around and edit a volume object.

fields.TargetSlot: The slot to influence or a component this is on.
fields.AutoPositionAtTargetSlot: Whether to position the gizmo at ``TargetSlot``.
fields._interactingComponent: The component like a Dev tool that is interacting with this gizmo.
fields._material: The material being used for the gizmo visual.
fields._toolPoint: The slot to position at the interacting tool's tip slot.
fields._activePoint: The slot to position at the active point.
fields._lineRoot: The slot that stores the line segment for tip based movement rather than projected mode.
fields._lineSegment: The mesh being used for the line visual to the interacting tool tip.
fields._snapHighlight: The slot storing the gizmo snap highlight visual.
fields.PointSpace: The space that the translation point is in.
fields.TargetPoint: The field in which to drive for the target point editing.
fields.UseCustomVisual: Whether or not to use a custom visual.
fields._customVisualRoot: The root of the custom visual element.
fields._visualRoot: The root of the default visual.
fields.CubeSize: The size of the visual root.
fields.CreateUndoSteps: Whether or not to create Undo steps for this gizmo.
fields._cubeSize: The field to drive with the cube size.
fields._colliderSize: The field to drive with the collider size.
